name: throne room
items_start: Iron statue of Pharoah seated on throne
hints: The throne room! An iron statue guards a chest. There's a chain and a mural.
REA MUR or LOO MUR: 'Seek ye well the HEART of Iron' - a clue about the statue.
PUL CHA to pull the chain - it reveals something. The iron statue won't let you unlock the chest.
The statue has a heart - find it. BUR (burn) the tanna leaves near the statue. PUL CHA reveals a passage up to the treasure room. D=ledge (20).

effects: Message: Mural: Seek ye well the HEART of Iron.
Message: Mural: Seek ye well the HEART of Iron.

notes: Throne room with iron statue (guards chest), chain (reveals passage), and mural ('Seek the HEART of Iron'). PUL CHA reveals access up. The chest contains treasures but statue blocks it. D=ledge (20).
